text_block_list.text:
We're taking a break during summer camp,
when...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Hey, hey. It's Spe and her trainer! You two
working hard or hardly working?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Sei! We're just taking a break now.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Oh? Well, perfect timing!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
How's about joining me for some deep sea
fishing?

We accept Seiun Sky's offer and leave the
crowded beach for some fishing fun. However...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Gah! Not a single bite!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! There's also a swimming spot around here,
so the fish might be a little on edge.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
But you've been getting bites this whole time,
haven't you?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Can I watch you fish for a little bit?! I bet you
wanna know the trick to it too, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Wow, look at you two in perfect sync. Although I
guess that makes sense for an Umamusume and
her trainer!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, I'm more than happy to show you, but
I'm not sure if I'll be of much help!
Special Week and I observe Seiun Sky fishing.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Huh? You've just been walking around and staring
at the water this whole time. Aren't you gonna
fish?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Easy now. There's no rush. It's very important to
pick the right spot.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Areas with a lot of noisy people are a no-go! That
just puts the fish on high alert...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Take that spot over there, for example. It has a
lot of vegetation to hide in... There should be a
bunch of fish there that have gotten a little too
comfy.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Comfy, huh? I see!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Yep, looks like we found a good spot. Let's get
fishing!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Wow... The way you wield your rod is a sight to
behold, Sei!

Seiun Sky is clever with her lure. Sometimes she
moves it swiftly. Sometimes she relaxes the lure
and allows it to drift.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
What's important is making them think they've
got the upper hand.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Make the fish think that we're weaker than 'em.
And then, when they come in for the kill...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
You turn the tables when they're at their most
vulnerable! Like... now!
Splash!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Whoooa!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Hnnngh! C'mon! ...Tch, it got away again!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Still keeping it up, are we, Spe? You've
always been persistent.
choice_data_list:
Your display of fishing mastery earlier was very
impressive.

Your display of fishing mastery earlier was very
impressive.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Nyahaha, You're gonna make me blush with these
compliments! ☆ C'mon now...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
As you can see, I wasn't gifted with the strongest
physique in the world.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
But surely there's still a way for me to have fun,
right? That's the kind of thing that floats around
in my mind.

A deeply ponderous look appears across Seiun
Sky's face as she says this.

Her results, both in races and in life, show that
she takes full advantage of her sharp intellect.

She's a racer who would snatch victory by
whatever means necessary.
choice_data_list: (She looks like she'd be a pretty tough rival!)
(She looks like she'd be a pretty tough rival!)

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Anyway, Spe. You're—

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Hrnghhh! C'mon!
Splaaaaash!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Oooh! I-I did it! I got a fish! Hey Trainer, I reeled
one in!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
...Wow, what a whopper! Gnh, I can't even carry
it!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
When it comes to a battle of guts... there's
nothing we can't do!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Seriously. You're strong, Spe. So—

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Sei, thanks for inviting us out today! Fishing was
so much fun!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Nyahaha! Glad to hear it.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Anyways, thank you both for tagging along.
G'night!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Sei's really something, isn't she? I bet she's always
strategizing her races like that...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Trainer, I—
choice_data_list: You need to strengthen your resolve.
You need to strengthen your resolve.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Trainer, I—
choice_data_list: You need to strengthen your resolve.
You need to strengthen your resolve.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! If my tables get turned, I'll turn them right
back!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
All right, that settles it! I'm gonna run some laps
while dragging a tire behind me. That'll really
power me up!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Oh! I'll drag you along too, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: At sixty kilometers per hour!

Special Week then trains her strength by literally
dragging me around, all so she can prepare for
her race against Seiun Sky.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Right! I needa learn to not let my guard down or
let the pace of other runners get to me!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
But... how am I supposed to strengthen my
resolve?
choice_data_list: Maybe by resisting the urge to eat tasty foods?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Say what?! Well... that does sound effective, I
guess...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Talk about tough training! But if I really wanna
win against Sei... I'll just have to bear it and keep
grinning!

Special Week throws herself into her mental
training in preparation for her race against Seiun
Sky.
